channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: DSWD distributes P7.3 billion in financial aid to over 1.4 million public transport drivers
item.description: The Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) has released more than P7.3 billion in cash assistance to over 1.4 million registered public utility vehicle (PUV) drivers nationwide. Assistant...

item.title: Australian and US markets show modest moves amid tech gains and rising bond yields
item.description: Australian shares are expected to open relatively flat, with ASX 200 futures down 27 points or 0.3 per cent to 8612. US markets saw declines in the S&P 500 and Nasdaq, although losses were pared durin...

item.title: Senator Challenges Attorney General on DOJ Fund and Trump Pardon Controversy
item.description: During a tense Senate Appropriations hearing on May 19, 2026, Sen. Chris Van Hollen (D-MD) confronted Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche regarding the Department of Justice's anti-weaponization fund...

item.title: APC clears 36 aspirants for Rivers State House of Assembly primaries, excludes Fubara loyalists
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) don finally release the list of 36 aspirants wey dem don clear for Rivers State House of Assembly primary elections wey dey set for Wednesday. Interestingly, none o...

item.title: Understanding the Impact of Social Media on Youth Mental Health and Self-Harm
item.description: In India, with 970 million people online, social media has become an integral tool for emotional regulation, especially among young people. While initially designed to keep people connected, these pla...

item.title: Top Canadian Royalty and Streaming Companies Benefiting from Rising Iron, Gold and Silver Prices
item.description: Iron, gold, and silver prices have seen notable increases in 2026, following strong gains in 2025. Gold has risen roughly 4% year-to-date and over 40% year-over-year, supported by central bank buying,...

item.title: Vanessa Feltz discusses past harassment by Rolf Harris and current MAFS UK sexual assault allegations
item.description: Vanessa Feltz has recounted a disturbing incident from her time on The Big Breakfast, in which she felt Rolf Harris move his hand up her thigh while they filmed on a bed together. Feltz explained that...

item.title: WSJ Warns Trump's Senate Endorsement Could Risk GOP Control
item.description: The Wall Street Journal's editorial board issued a sharp warning to President Donald Trump, suggesting his latest political maneuver could jeopardize Republican control of the Senate. The editorial cr...

item.title: ACT Government Increases Paramedic and Firefighter Staffing to Boost Emergency Services
item.description: The ACT government has announced funding for new full-time paramedic roles following a 2025 review that identified a shortfall of 83 paramedics, particularly impacting night shifts. The new funding in...

item.title: Bonko Khoza Responds to Allegations Regarding 2023 Red Ink Set Incident
item.description: Actor Bonko Khoza has publicly addressed allegations made by actress Nirvana Nokwe-Mseleku regarding an incident on the set of the 2023 production Red Ink. Khoza stated that the scene in question was ...

item.title: Canada Faces Challenges in Launching Major Resource Projects
item.description: Canada possesses vast natural resources, yet translating this potential into large-scale, nation-building projects has proven challenging. Regulatory delays, high costs, and remote locations often slo...

item.title: House Minority Leader asks Ombudsman to investigate irregularities in Davao flood control projects
item.description: House Deputy Minority Leader and ACT Teachers Party-List Representative Antonio Tinio formally requested the Office of the Ombudsman to investigate alleged irregularities in flood control projects in ...

item.title: Behind the Scenes of John Travolta’s Role in Blow Out (1981)
item.description: John Travolta’s performance in 'Blow Out' (1981) is widely celebrated by critics and filmmakers, including Quentin Tarantino, as one of the highlights of his career. Collaborating again with director ...

item.title: Parliament Oversight Meeting on NSFAS Administration Cancelled Amid Governance Concerns
item.description: The planned Portfolio Committee meeting at NSFAS headquarters collapsed after the Department of Higher Education and Training and NSFAS failed to submit presentations ahead of the session. Minister Bu...

item.title: A Visual Look at 1990s Teenage Girls’ Fashion Through Studio Portraits
item.description: The 1990s were a defining era for teenage girls’ fashion, a time before social media shaped trends globally. This collection of 30 studio portraits showcases the diverse styles that characterized this...

item.title: A Guide to the Healthiest Breads: Whole-Grain, Sprouted, Sourdough, Oat and Rye
item.description: Bread remains a staple in many diets, yet shoppers often struggle to distinguish genuinely healthy options from those high in refined carbohydrates and additives. Dietitians emphasise that whole-grain...

item.title: South Africa Skips Africa Forward Summit, Highlighting Diplomatic Principles Over Participation
item.description: The Africa Forward Summit held in Nairobi, intended as a showcase of French President Emmanuel Macron's shift from Francophone Africa to closer engagement with English-speaking nations, faced numerous...

item.title: Village Watchman and Vendor Killed in Dasmariñas, Cavite Shooting
item.description: In Dasmariñas, Cavite, a tragic shooting incident claimed the lives of two individuals on Monday morning. The victims were a 51-year-old village watchman, identified only as Rody, and a 48-year-old ve...

item.title: Arsenal Secures Premier League Title and Expected Financial Gains
item.description: Arsenal ended a 22-year wait for the Premier League crown after Manchester City were held to a 1-1 draw by Bournemouth, securing the 2025/26 league title with one game to spare. Fans went wild on soci...

item.title: Shrinking Aid Makes Jobs Critical for Refugees and Local Communities in Kenya
item.description: Kenya is currently facing a critical moment in addressing forced displacement as humanitarian aid declines. The World Bank, UNHCR, and the Center for Effective Global Action conducted a study between ...
